scope: N=1 pinned upstream issue. This is a demonstrator of Reprove's evidence contract, not a statistically general performance claim.

integrity.tracked_source_check: git diff --quiet on both pinned worktrees after execution

limitations: The regression scenario is the accepted upstream test; this measures execution, determinism, and gold-patch validation, not autonomous test generation quality.
N=1 is deliberately displayed beside every rate. Expand to a predeclared multi-project corpus before comparing systems.
The official Docker-based SWE-bench evaluator was not run on this ARM machine because Docker was unavailable and free storage was below the official recommendation.
